{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Operations Manager",
  "description": "Fenchurch Group is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Operations Manager

Job Location: Nigeria

Role Purpose


	The Business Operations owns the franchise&#39;s commercial, technical, and regulatory performance.
	The successful candidate shall translate Management&#39;s strategic mandate into core operations, driving the reduction of Aggregate Technical Commercial &amp;Collection (ATC&amp;C) losses whilst providing leadership and driving strategic performance for the business.


Key Responsibilties
Strategic Leadership:


	Own and drive the franchise&#39;s ATC&amp;C loss reduction roadmap, setting monthly milestones, tracking progress, with Management Information System.
	Develop and regularly update operational plan ranging from metering, revenue assurance, network management, and customer engagement
	Set individual and team KPIs; hold weekly performance review meetings with key stakeholders
	Develop business strategies, manage budget allocation, and support investment decisions.


Commercial &amp; Revenue Oversight:


	Oversee and validate revenues cycle ranging from energy received, billed, and money collected.
	Drive collection efficiency improvement strategies and review collection performance on weekly basis.
	Champion the energy transition programmes ranging from prepaid to smart metering; monitor metering rollout against monthly targets
	Ensure commercial losses (theft, bypass, unmetered consumption) are reduced to bear minimum through loss reduction strategies.


Technical &amp; Network Oversight:


	Ensure the feeder operates at maximum availability whilst owning network resilience.
	Approve planned maintenance schedules and emergency response protocols.


Compliance &amp; Stakeholder Relations:


	Ensure full compliance with NERC regulations, Disco&rsquo;s franchise agreement, and health &amp; safety standards at all times
	Serve as the primary contact for the Disco, NERC, and community/customer escalations; promptly resolve regulatory issues in line with SLA.
	Prepare and submit monthly performance reports to the Management, ensuring accuracy and candour
	Maintain a positive and collaborative relationship with community leaders to support revenue enforcement and infrastructure protection.


Team &amp; Culture:


	Recruit, onboard, and develop a high-performance team; hold all staff to clear standards of conduct, output, and customer service
	Foster a zero-tolerance culture for revenue leakage, theft, and collusion by staff
	Ensure Internal Auditor operates with full independence and that all audit findings are resolved within agreed timelines.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Engineering, Science, Arts, or a related field (Master&#39;s degree is advantageous)
	Minimum of 12 years of experience in electricity distribution or utility management, with at least 3 years in a management role
	Strong understanding of NERC regulations, and Nigerian Electricity Supply Industry
	Proficiency in strategic planning, energy accounting, revenue assurance, and operational data analysis.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-29",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-13",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

Business Operations Manager Job at Fenchurch Group




        
    

        
        Fenchurch Group is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Operations Manager

Job Location: Nigeria

Role Purpose


	The Business Operations owns the franchise's commercial, technical, and regulatory performance.
	The successful candidate shall translate Management's strategic mandate into core operations, driving the reduction of Aggregate Technical Commercial &Collection (ATC&C) losses whilst providing leadership and driving strategic performance for the business.


Key Responsibilties
Strategic Leadership:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Own and drive the franchise's ATC&C loss reduction roadmap, setting monthly milestones, tracking progress, with Management Information System.
	Develop and regularly update operational plan ranging from metering, revenue assurance, network management, and customer engagement
	Set individual and team KPIs; hold weekly performance review meetings with key stakeholders
	Develop business strategies, manage budget allocation, and support investment decisions.


Commercial & Revenue Oversight:


	Oversee and validate revenues cycle ranging from energy received, billed, and money collected.
	Drive collection efficiency improvement strategies and review collection performance on weekly basis.
	Champion the energy transition programmes ranging from prepaid to smart metering; monitor metering rollout against monthly targets
	Ensure commercial losses (theft, bypass, unmetered consumption) are reduced to bear minimum through loss reduction strategies.


Technical & Network Oversight:


	Ensure the feeder operates at maximum availability whilst owning network resilience.
	Approve planned maintenance schedules and emergency response protocols.


Compliance & Stakeholder Relations:


	Ensure full compliance with NERC regulations, Disco’s franchise agreement, and health & safety standards at all times
	Serve as the primary contact for the Disco, NERC, and community/customer escalations; promptly resolve regulatory issues in line with SLA.
	Prepare and submit monthly performance reports to the Management, ensuring accuracy and candour
	Maintain a positive and collaborative relationship with community leaders to support revenue enforcement and infrastructure protection.


Team & Culture:


	Recruit, onboard, and develop a high-performance team; hold all staff to clear standards of conduct, output, and customer service
	Foster a zero-tolerance culture for revenue leakage, theft, and collusion by staff
	Ensure Internal Auditor operates with full independence and that all audit findings are resolved within agreed timelines.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor's Degree in Engineering, Science, Arts, or a related field (Master's degree is advantageous)
	Minimum of 12 years of experience in electricity distribution or utility management, with at least 3 years in a management role
	Strong understanding of NERC regulations, and Nigerian Electricity Supply Industry
	Proficiency in strategic planning, energy accounting, revenue assurance, and operational data analysis.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Online English and Mathematics Teacher",
  "description": "RankReform.com is a digital marketing agency that helps businesses improve their online presence and grow their visibility. The agency specializes in SEO (Search Engine Optimization), content marketing, social media management, and website development. RankReform also offers automation tools and AI-powered solutions to streamline marketing efforts, attract more customers, and increase revenue.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Online English and Mathematics Teacher

Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Part-time

Description


	We are looking for a dedicated and experienced Online English and Mathematics Teacher to teach a 10-year-old child through virtual classes.
	The ideal candidate must be patient, fluent in English, skilled in teaching children, and able to make learning engaging and easy to understand.
	This role is suitable for someone with strong communication skills, a good teaching approach, and the ability to work independently while maintaining a positive learning environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Teach English Language and Mathematics online to a 10-year-old child.
	Prepare simple and engaging lesson plans.
	Conduct classes online for 2 hours daily.
	Assist the child with assignments, exercises, and learning improvement.
	Monitor learning progress and provide feedback when necessary.
	Use interactive teaching methods to keep lessons interesting.
	Maintain professionalism, punctuality, and consistency during classes.


Required Skills &amp; Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an OND, HND, Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree, or equivalent practical teaching experience.


Applicants must have:


	Good spoken and written English
	Strong knowledge of basic English and Mathematics
	Ability to teach children effectively and patiently
	Experience in online teaching or tutoring is an advantage
	A working laptop and stable internet connection
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to create a friendly and productive learning environment
	Ability to work independently and stay committed to the teaching schedule.


Important Requirement
Applicants must have access to:


	A functional laptop
	Stable internet connection
	A quiet environment suitable for online teaching
	Basic knowledge of Zoom, Google Meet, or similar online teaching platforms.


Applicants may also be asked to provide:


	A short introduction video
	Teaching experience details
	Demo teaching session
	Evidence of previous teaching or tutoring experience (if available).


What We Offer


	Salary: N50,000 &ndash; N100,000 monthly, depending on experience and teaching ability
	Only 2 hours of teaching daily
	Flexible remote work structure
	Long-term opportunity for outstanding teachers
	Supportive and respectful working environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: uzochukwu.chinenye23@gmail.com using &ldquo;Online English and Mathematics Teacher&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Online English and Mathematics Teacher Job at RankReform.com




        
    

        
        RankReform.com is a digital marketing agency that helps businesses improve their online presence and grow their visibility. The agency specializes in SEO (Search Engine Optimization), content marketing, social media management, and website development. RankReform also offers automation tools and AI-powered solutions to streamline marketing efforts, attract more customers, and increase revenue.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Online English and Mathematics Teacher

Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Part-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a dedicated and experienced Online English and Mathematics Teacher to teach a 10-year-old child through virtual classes.
	The ideal candidate must be patient, fluent in English, skilled in teaching children, and able to make learning engaging and easy to understand.
	This role is suitable for someone with strong communication skills, a good teaching approach, and the ability to work independently while maintaining a positive learning environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Teach English Language and Mathematics online to a 10-year-old child.
	Prepare simple and engaging lesson plans.
	Conduct classes online for 2 hours daily.
	Assist the child with assignments, exercises, and learning improvement.
	Monitor learning progress and provide feedback when necessary.
	Use interactive teaching methods to keep lessons interesting.
	Maintain professionalism, punctuality, and consistency during classes.


Required Skills & Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an OND, HND, Bachelor’s Degree, or equivalent practical teaching experience.


Applicants must have:


	Good spoken and written English
	Strong knowledge of basic English and Mathematics
	Ability to teach children effectively and patiently
	Experience in online teaching or tutoring is an advantage
	A working laptop and stable internet connection
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to create a friendly and productive learning environment
	Ability to work independently and stay committed to the teaching schedule.


Important Requirement
Applicants must have access to:


	A functional laptop
	Stable internet connection
	A quiet environment suitable for online teaching
	Basic knowledge of Zoom, Google Meet, or similar online teaching platforms.


Applicants may also be asked to provide:


	A short introduction video
	Teaching experience details
	Demo teaching session
	Evidence of previous teaching or tutoring experience (if available).


What We Offer


	Salary: N50,000 – N100,000 monthly, depending on experience and teaching ability
	Only 2 hours of teaching daily
	Flexible remote work structure
	Long-term opportunity for outstanding teachers
	Supportive and respectful working environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Online English and Mathematics Teacher” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

IITA is a member of CGIAR, a global agriculture research partnership for a food secure future.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant II

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Job type: 3-years renewable contract&nbsp;

Responsibilities


	Process payments to foreign banks using Oracle Accounts Payable (AP) modules.
	Initiate fund transfers through various foreign bank account platforms.
	Respond to enquiries relating to foreign fund transfers and payment transactions.
	Provide support by relieving the Assistant Treasury Manager and Cashier in their absence.
	Reconcile overseas creditors/suppliers Accounts Payable (AP) balances.
	Maintain and reconcile prepayment schedules with appropriate supporting documentation across stations and headquarters.
	Prepare imprest reimbursement for IITA stations, including IITA Limited.
	Reconcile clearing accounts and ensure accurate recognition of bank charges.


Requirements

	Possession of ACA or ACCA is an added advantage.

	Sound knowledge and practical experience in Oracle EBS.

	Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Office Suite.

	Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to work effectively as a team player.
	Honest, dependable, and result-oriented personality.
	Pleasant personality with good communication skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet set targets and deadlines.

Accountant II Job at the International Institute of Tropical Agriculture (IITA)




        
    

        
        The International Institute of Tropical Agriculture (IITA) is a not-for-profit institution that generates agricultural innovations to meet Africa’s most pressing challenges of hunger, malnutrition, poverty, and natural resource degradation. Working with various partners across sub-Saharan Africa, we improve livelihoods, enhance food and nutrition security, increase employment, and preserve natural resource integrity. IITA is a member of CGIAR, a global agriculture research partnership for a food secure future.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant II

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Job type: 3-years renewable contract 

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Process payments to foreign banks using Oracle Accounts Payable (AP) modules.
	Initiate fund transfers through various foreign bank account platforms.
	Respond to enquiries relating to foreign fund transfers and payment transactions.
	Provide support by relieving the Assistant Treasury Manager and Cashier in their absence.
	Reconcile overseas creditors/suppliers Accounts Payable (AP) balances.
	Maintain and reconcile prepayment schedules with appropriate supporting documentation across stations and headquarters.
	Prepare imprest reimbursement for IITA stations, including IITA Limited.
	Reconcile clearing accounts and ensure accurate recognition of bank charges.


Requirements


	B.Sc / HND in Finance and Accounting or related field with a minimum of three (3) years’ experience performing a similar role in a well-structured environment.
	Possession of ACA or ACCA is an added advantage.


Competencies:
The ideal candidate must have:


	Sound knowledge and practical experience in Oracle EBS.
	Proficiency in the use of international banking platforms.
	Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Office Suite.
	Excellent attention to detail and high level of accuracy.
	Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to work effectively as a team player.
	Honest, dependable, and result-oriented personality.
	Pleasant personality with good communication skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet set targets and deadlines.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Fashion Illustrator & Creative Assistant",
  "description": "FirstExcelsia is a firm of highly versatile and renowned Human Resources, Organisational Development and Management consultants with operations across several states in Nigeria. We have an in-depth understanding of the Nigerian business terrain and we are very passionate about partnering with indigenous organisations to develop glocalised HR solutions, processes and structures required to develop and effectively drive our clients&#39; corporate strategies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fashion Illustrator &amp; Creative Assistant

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Fashion Industry

Summary


	Are you passionate about fashion, creativity, and visual storytelling? We are looking for a talented and innovative Fashion Illustrator &amp; Creative Assistant to join our team and support the development of compelling fashion concepts, creative content, and brand visuals.


Key Responsibilities


	Create original fashion illustrations, sketches, textile patterns, and design concepts.
	Assist in developing creative ideas that align with the brand&rsquo;s identity and aesthetic.
	Support production processes by preparing mock-ups, samples, and design templates.
	Collaborate with production teams and artisans to ensure accurate execution of designs.
	Create engaging visual content for social media, campaigns, lookbooks, and marketing materials.
	Assist with photoshoots, styling, and content curation.
	Research fashion trends, creative inspirations, and innovative design techniques.
	Maintain organized creative files, mood boards, and design references.
	Monitor social media engagement and support community interactions where required.
	Prepare reports, document creative processes, and support performance tracking activities.
	Demonstrate strong attention to detail, creativity, problem-solving ability, and adaptability in executing tasks.
	Work collaboratively with internal teams while managing multiple projects effectively within deadlines.
	Support additional creative and administrative tasks as assigned.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree, HND, or equivalent qualification.
	Minimum of 5 years of work experience.
	At least 3 years of experience in fashion illustration, creative design, or marketing-related roles.
	Strong illustration, visual design, and content development skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Excellent organizational, time management, and documentation skills.
	Ability to think creatively and contribute innovative ideas to brand development.
	Basic understanding of social media management and community engagement is an added advantage.
	Ability to analyze performance trends and support creative improvement initiatives.
	Must be detail-oriented and able to thrive in a fast-paced work environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: talentsearch@firstexcelsia.com using &quot;Fashion Illustrator &amp; Creative Assistant Application&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-30",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "FirstExcelsia"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

Fashion Illustrator & Creative Assistant Job at FirstExcelsia




        
    

        
        FirstExcelsia is a firm of highly versatile and renowned Human Resources, Organisational Development and Management consultants with operations across several states in Nigeria. We have an in-depth understanding of the Nigerian business terrain and we are very passionate about partnering with indigenous organisations to develop glocalised HR solutions, processes and structures required to develop and effectively drive our clients' corporate strategies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fashion Illustrator & Creative Assistant

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Fashion Industry

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you passionate about fashion, creativity, and visual storytelling? We are looking for a talented and innovative Fashion Illustrator & Creative Assistant to join our team and support the development of compelling fashion concepts, creative content, and brand visuals.


Key Responsibilities


	Create original fashion illustrations, sketches, textile patterns, and design concepts.
	Assist in developing creative ideas that align with the brand’s identity and aesthetic.
	Support production processes by preparing mock-ups, samples, and design templates.
	Collaborate with production teams and artisans to ensure accurate execution of designs.
	Create engaging visual content for social media, campaigns, lookbooks, and marketing materials.
	Assist with photoshoots, styling, and content curation.
	Research fashion trends, creative inspirations, and innovative design techniques.
	Maintain organized creative files, mood boards, and design references.
	Monitor social media engagement and support community interactions where required.
	Prepare reports, document creative processes, and support performance tracking activities.
	Demonstrate strong attention to detail, creativity, problem-solving ability, and adaptability in executing tasks.
	Work collaboratively with internal teams while managing multiple projects effectively within deadlines.
	Support additional creative and administrative tasks as assigned.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree, HND, or equivalent qualification.
	Minimum of 5 years of work experience.
	At least 3 years of experience in fashion illustration, creative design, or marketing-related roles.
	Strong illustration, visual design, and content development skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Excellent organizational, time management, and documentation skills.
	Ability to think creatively and contribute innovative ideas to brand development.
	Basic understanding of social media management and community engagement is an added advantage.
	Ability to analyze performance trends and support creative improvement initiatives.
	Must be detail-oriented and able to thrive in a fast-paced work environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using "Fashion Illustrator & Creative Assistant Application” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
